role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues consistent with the English countryside.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (Ligustrum/Privet) and their regional prevalence.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, curbing, and utility infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles (weatherboarding) and cross-domain features to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United Kingdom. The specialists provided grounded, image-consistent evidence (weatherboarding, privet hedges, narrow lanes). The tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish the UK from close analogs like Ireland and the USA.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of lush greenery and narrow lanes match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Privet hedges and deciduous trees are clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road width and lack of curbs are accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Weatherboard siding and chimney details are visible.
